nasb.text: He also overlaid the house with gold—the beams, the thresholds and its walls and its doors; and he carved cherubim on the walls.

esv.text: So he lined the house with gold—its beams, its thresholds, its walls, and its doors—and he carved cherubim on the walls.

cnv.text: 正殿和殿的棟梁、門檻、牆壁和門扇，都貼上金子；牆上刻上基路伯。

ccb.text: 殿的栋梁、墙壁、门槛和门扇也都贴上金子；墙上还刻上基路伯天使。
